hint: Your browser will open huggingface.co to authorize this app. The token is stored encrypted on this device only.
missingWriteScope: Your access token is missing the "write-discussions" permission, so this action isn't available.
signingInHint: Complete the authorization in your browser, or cancel to try again.

tokenSignIn.createLink: Create a token on the Hub
tokenSignIn.hint: Paste a User Access Token from the Hub. Unlike browser sign-in, a token can also read your Hub notification inbox. It replaces the current session and is stored encrypted on this device only.
tokenSignIn.invalid: The Hub rejected this token. Check that it was copied fully and hasn't been revoked.
tokenSignIn.label: User Access Token
tokenSignIn.network: Couldn't reach the Hub to verify the token. Check your connection and try again.
tokenSignIn.switchToOauth: Sign in with Hugging Face instead
